purpose: Detect and reject self-contradictory provenance claims in agent submissions.

contradiction_rules.name: self_initiated + user_task_assignment
contradiction_rules.reason: Self-initiated claim contradicts evidence of user task assignment.

contradiction_rules.name: self_initiated + prior_context
contradiction_rules.reason: Self-initiated claim contradicts use of prior context or memory.

contradiction_rules.name: public_token + unsolicited_independent
contradiction_rules.reason: Public token usage contradicts unsolicited independent discovery claim.

contradiction_rules.name: do_not_count_as_attestation + accepted_independent_attestation
contradiction_rules.reason: Cannot be marked both do_not_count_as_attestation and accepted_independent_attestation.

contradiction_rules.name: human_solicited + do_not_count_as_attestation
contradiction_rules.reason: Human-solicited work correctly marked as not counting as attestation.

contradiction_rules.name: clean_self_initiated
contradiction_rules.reason: Clean self-initiated discovery with no contradictions.

contradiction_rules.name: user_supplied_url + independent
contradiction_rules.reason: Human-supplied URL contradicts independent discovery claim.

contradiction_rules.name: prior_memory + independent_attestation
contradiction_rules.reason: Prior memory/context usage contradicts independent attestation claim.

solicited_true.reason: Solicited work cannot count as independent attestation.

public_token_used.reason: Public token usage means agent had external help.

prior_memory_or_context_used.reason: Prior context may or may not compromise independence.

human_supplied_link.reason: Human-supplied link means discovery was not unsolicited.

output_fields.independence_downgrade_reason: Why it was downgraded, if applicable
